source: # set the feature_flag to default value
bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249 = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

# Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col,
    concat,
    concat_ws,
    current_timestamp,
    date_format,
    hash,
    lit,
    sha2,
    to_timestamp,
)

from pyspark.sql.types import (
    BooleanType,
    DateType,
    DoubleType,
    IntegerType,
    StringType,
    StructField,
    StructType,
    TimestampType,
)

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameters from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_MSATS_Bronze"
lake_db_name = "aemo_bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

#Get load meta from controldb

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

#Join cfg_notebook and cfg_notebook_parameter tables to retrieve source & target meta from controldb

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file path

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

# Display values
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_bronze =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_bronze:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create MSATS Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "MSATS" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/MSATS")
# Table: **msats_nmi_data**: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="msats_nmi_data"

#Create Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	ParticipantId STRING,
	SequenceNumber INT,
	CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
	RowStatus STRING,
	FromDate TIMESTAMP,
	ToDate TIMESTAMP,
	NMI STRING,
	JurisdictionCode STRING,
	NMIClassificationCode STRING,
	TransmissionNodeIdentifier STRING,
	TransmissionNodeIdentifier2 STRING,
	DistributionLossFactorCode STRING,
	ParentEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier STRING,
	ChildEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier STRING,
	BuildingName STRING,
	LotNumber STRING,
	FlatNumber STRING,
	FlatType STRING,
	FloorNumber STRING,
	FloorType STRING,
	HouseNumber STRING,	
	HouseNumberSuffix STRING,
	HouseNumberTo STRING,
	HouseNumberToSuffix STRING,
	StreetName STRING,
	StreetType STRING,
	StreetSuffix STRING,
	Suburb STRING,
	LocationDescriptor STRING,
	State STRING,
	PostCode STRING,
	GNAFPID STRING,
	DeliveryPointIdentifier STRING,
	Aggregate STRING,
	FeederClass STRING,
	Status STRING,
	CustomerClassificationCode STRING,
	CustomerThresholdCode STRING,
	LastConsumerChangeDate DATE,
	SharedIsolationPointFlag STRING,
	ConnectionConfiguration STRING,
	MeterMalfunctionExemptionNumber  STRING,
	MeterMalfunctionExemptionExpiryDate DATE,
	FileName STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    HashKey STRING  
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
#Load raw data
raw_df = spark.read.table("aemo_bronze.msats_nmi_data_raw")

# Add CDC columns
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CreationDate","MaintenanceDate","RowStatus","FromDate","ToDate","NMI","JurisdictionCode","NMIClassificationCode","TransmissionNodeIdentifier","TransmissionNodeIdentifier2","DistributionLossFactorCode","ParentEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier","ChildEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier","BuildingOrPropertyName","LotNumber","FlatOrUnitNumber","FlatOrUnitType","FloorOrLevelNumber","FloorOrLevelType","HouseNumber","HouseNumberSuffix","HouseNumberTo","HouseNumberToSuffix","StreetName","StreetType","StreetSuffix","SuburbOrPlaceOrLocality","LocationDescriptor","StateOrTerritory","PostCode","GNAFPID","DeliveryPointIdentifier","Aggregate","FeederClass","Status","CustomerClassificationCode","CustomerThresholdCode","LastConsumerChangeDate","SharedIsolationPointFlag","ConnectionConfiguration","MeterMalfunctionExemptionNumber","MeterMalfunctionExemptionExpiryDate"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# insert the source data to target bronze table
spark.sql(f"""
    INSERT INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
        (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,CreationDate,MaintenanceDate,RowStatus,FromDate,ToDate,NMI,JurisdictionCode,NMIClassificationCode,TransmissionNodeIdentifier,
        TransmissionNodeIdentifier2,DistributionLossFactorCode,ParentEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier,ChildEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier,BuildingName,LotNumber,
        FlatNumber,FlatType,FloorNumber,FloorType,HouseNumber,HouseNumberSuffix,HouseNumberTo,HouseNumberToSuffix,StreetName,StreetType,StreetSuffix,Suburb,LocationDescriptor,
        State,PostCode,GNAFPID,DeliveryPointIdentifier,Aggregate,FeederClass,Status,CustomerClassificationCode,CustomerThresholdCode,LastConsumerChangeDate,SharedIsolationPointFlag,
        ConnectionConfiguration,MeterMalfunctionExemptionNumber,MeterMalfunctionExemptionExpiryDate,FileName,CDCLoadDate,HashKey)
    SELECT

        s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.CreationDate,s.MaintenanceDate,s.RowStatus,s.FromDate,s.ToDate,s.NMI,s.JurisdictionCode,s.NMIClassificationCode,s.TransmissionNodeIdentifier,
        s.TransmissionNodeIdentifier2,s.DistributionLossFactorCode,s.ParentEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier,s.ChildEmbeddedNetworkIdentifier,s.BuildingOrPropertyName,s.LotNumber,
        s.FlatOrUnitNumber,s.FlatOrUnitType,s.FloorOrLevelNumber,s.FloorOrLevelType,s.HouseNumber,s.HouseNumberSuffix,s.HouseNumberTo,s.HouseNumberToSuffix,s.StreetName,s.StreetType,s.StreetSuffix,s.SuburbOrPlaceOrLocality,s.LocationDescriptor,
        s.StateOrTerritory,s.PostCode,s.GNAFPID,s.DeliveryPointIdentifier,s.Aggregate,s.FeederClass,s.Status,s.CustomerClassificationCode,s.CustomerThresholdCode,s.LastConsumerChangeDate,s.SharedIsolationPointFlag,
        s.ConnectionConfiguration,s.MeterMalfunctionExemptionNumber,s.MeterMalfunctionExemptionExpiryDate,s.FileName,s.CDCLoadDate,s.HashKey

    FROM temp_table s;
#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = 0
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre)
Bronze_Delete = 0
Bronze_ActiveRows = 0
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_Insert_Post

print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
#  Table: **msats_nmi_data**: END
#  Table: **msats_nmi_role**: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="msats_nmi_role"

#Create Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	ParticipantId STRING,
	SequenceNumber INT,
	CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
	RowStatus STRING,
	FromDate TIMESTAMP,
	ToDate TIMESTAMP,
	NMI STRING,
	Party STRING,
	Role STRING,	
	FileName STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    HashKey STRING 
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
#Load raw data
raw_df = spark.read.table("aemo_bronze.msats_nmi_role_raw")

# Add CDC columns
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CreationDate","MaintenanceDate","RowStatus","FromDate","ToDate","NMI","Party","Role"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# insert the source data to target bronze table
spark.sql(f"""
    INSERT INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
      (ParticipantId,SequenceNumber,CreationDate,MaintenanceDate,RowStatus,FromDate,ToDate,NMI,Party,Role,FileName,CDCLoadDate,HashKey)

    SELECT

      s.ParticipantId,s.SequenceNumber,s.CreationDate,s.MaintenanceDate,s.RowStatus,s.FromDate,s.ToDate,s.NMI,s.Party,s.Role,s.FileName,s.CDCLoadDate,s.HashKey

     FROM temp_table s;
#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = 0
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre)
Bronze_Delete = 0
Bronze_ActiveRows = 0
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_Insert_Post

print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
#  Table: **msats_nmi_role**: END
# Table: **msats_nmi_meters**: START

if bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    #Create _raw table in Bronze layer
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
    (
        ParticipantId STRING,
        SequenceNumber INT,
        CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
        MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
        RowStatus STRING,
        FromDate TIMESTAMP,
        ToDate TIMESTAMP,
        NMI STRING,
        SerialNumber STRING,
        Location STRING,
        Hazard STRING,
        InstallationTypeCode STRING,
        Use STRING,
        Manufacturer STRING,
        Model STRING,
        LastTestDate DATE,
        TestResult STRING,
        ReadTypeCode STRING,
        NextScheduledReadDate DATE,
        Status STRING,
        CurrentTransformerType STRING,
        CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable STRING,
        CurrentTransformerRatioConnected STRING,
        CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass STRING,
        CurrentTransformerTest STRING,
        CurrentTransformerTestDate DATE,
        CurrentTransformerLocation STRING,
        VoltageTransformerType STRING,
        VoltageTransformerRatio STRING,
        VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass STRING,
        VoltageTransformerTest STRING,
        VoltageTransformerTestDate DATE,
        VoltageTransformerLocation STRING,
        Latitude DECIMAL(10 ,7),
        Longitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
        FileName STRING,
        CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
        HashKey STRING 
    )
    USING delta
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
    """)

else:
	print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    # Add CDC columns
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
    #raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||","CreationDate","MaintenanceDate","RowStatus","FromDate","ToDate","NMI","SerialNumber","Location","Hazard", "InstallationTypeCode","Use","Manufacturer","Model","LastTestDate","TestResult","ReadTypeCode", "NextScheduledReadDate","Status","CurrentTransformerType","CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable", "CurrentTransformerRatioConnected","CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass","CurrentTransformerTest", "CurrentTransformerTestDate","CurrentTransformerLocation","VoltageTransformerType", "VoltageTransformerRatio","VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass","VoltageTransformerTest", "VoltageTransformerTestDate","VoltageTransformerLocation","Latitude","Longitude"), 256))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
else:
	print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    # Create a temporary view of the dataframe
    raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

    # insert the source data to target bronze table
    spark.sql(f"""
        INSERT INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
            (
                ParticipantId,
                SequenceNumber,
                CreationDate,
                MaintenanceDate,
                RowStatus,
                FromDate,
                ToDate,
                NMI,
                SerialNumber,
                Location,
                Hazard,
                InstallationTypeCode,
                Use,
                Manufacturer,
                Model,
                LastTestDate,
                TestResult,
                ReadTypeCode,
                NextScheduledReadDate,
                Status,
                CurrentTransformerType,
                CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable,
                CurrentTransformerRatioConnected,
                CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass,
                CurrentTransformerTest,
                CurrentTransformerTestDate,
                CurrentTransformerLocation,
                VoltageTransformerType,
                VoltageTransformerRatio,
                VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass,
                VoltageTransformerTest,
                VoltageTransformerTestDate,
                VoltageTransformerLocation,
                Latitude,
                Longitude,
                FileName,
                CDCLoadDate,
                HashKey
            )
        SELECT
                s.ParticipantId,
                s.SequenceNumber,
                s.CreationDate,
                s.MaintenanceDate,
                s.RowStatus,
                s.FromDate,
                s.ToDate,
                s.NMI,
                s.SerialNumber,
                s.Location,
                s.Hazard,
                s.InstallationTypeCode,
                s.Use,
                s.Manufacturer,
                s.Model,
                s.LastTestDate,
                s.TestResult,
                s.ReadTypeCode,
                s.NextScheduledReadDate,
                s.Status,
                s.CurrentTransformerType,
                s.CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable,
                s.CurrentTransformerRatioConnected,
                s.CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass,
                s.CurrentTransformerTest,
                s.CurrentTransformerTestDate,
                s.CurrentTransformerLocation,
                s.VoltageTransformerType,
                s.VoltageTransformerRatio,
                s.VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass,
                s.VoltageTransformerTest,
                s.VoltageTransformerTestDate,
                s.VoltageTransformerLocation,
                s.Latitude,
                s.Longitude,
                s.FileName,
                s.CDCLoadDate,
                s.HashKey
        FROM temp_table s;
    """)
else:
	print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    #Row calculation
    Bronze_Update = 0
    Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre)
    Bronze_Delete = 0
    Bronze_ActiveRows = 0
    Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_Insert_Post
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

if bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    #Create dataframe to insert log to controldb
    log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
    print(log_data)
    log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
    df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
else:
	print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if bronze_electricity_nmi_meters_23249:
    #Write df_log to logging table in controldb
    db_port = 1433
    linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
    linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
    sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
    db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
    access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
    write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

    try:
        df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
            .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
            .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
            .option("accessToken", access_token) \
            .option("encrypt", "true") \
            .option("databaseName", db_name) \
            .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
            .mode("append") \
            .save()
    except ValueError as error :
        print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

    print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
else:
	print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
# Table: **msats_nmi_meters**: END

# Cleanup Raw Files 
raw_output_path = f"abfss://raw@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/MSATS/"
mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
